V0902_01_00_00_0.text: If I defeat you, you gotta admit that you're an alien!

V0902_01_00_01_0.text:
I know you're an alien!
Give me back my Earthdama!

V0902_01_00_02_0.text: If I Duel my Duel, I know I'm gonna win!

V0902_01_00_03_0.text: You're gonna learn why you should've never messed with me!

V0902_01_00_04_0.text: I'm gonna Duel like I never Dueled before!

V0902_01_00_05_0.text:
Making sure I got the right cards in my deck…hah!
Good!

V0902_01_00_07_0.text:
Ready, Yudias?
I'll teach you how to Rush Duel!

V0902_01_00_08_0.text: Every Duel I Duel, I get that much stronger, Yuamu!

V0902_01_00_10_0.text: Ever since you stole my Earthdama, my Dueling's been a mess!

V0902_01_00_10_1.text: I'm challenging you to a rematch!

V0902_01_00_11_0.text: You’re the most evil alien ever!

V0902_01_00_12_0.text:
Zuwijo!
I won't let you use Rush Duels to fight your war!

V0902_01_00_13_0.text: You may be a lot of things, but you're just Damamu to me!

V0902_03_00_00_0.text: You can't stop me from grabbing the win!

V0902_03_00_01_0.text: I think this is gonna be the last turn of the Duel!

V0902_03_00_04_0.text: You've had your fun, but I'll now turn this Duel around!

V0902_03_00_05_0.text: Since this is a Rush Duel, I always have a chance to win!

V0902_05_00_00_0.text: Making huge comebacks is what Rush Duels are all about!

V0902_07_09_00_0.text: This is the card I had Set!

V0902_07_09_01_0.text: Don't tell me you forgot about this card!

V0902_11_01_00_0.text: I Summon a monster in Defense Position!

V0902_16_00_01_0.text: There's no way you can survive this!

V0902_21_00_00_0.text: This Duel's easier than I thought it'd be!

V0902_21_00_01_0.text: It's nice to know I can't lose next turn.

V0902_21_00_04_0.text:
It's over...
My defenses are destroyed...

V0902_21_00_05_0.text: Making a big comeback is gonna be so cool!

V0902_28_00_00_0.text:
You know...
You don't really act like an alien.
Are you one?

V0902_28_00_01_0.text:
All right!
I got you good!

V0902_28_00_02_0.text: That went more perfect than I expected!

V0902_28_00_03_0.text: You don't know anything about Rush Duels, do you.

V0902_28_00_04_0.text: No matter how bad it looks, it's never over in a Rush Duel!

V0902_28_00_05_0.text: When UTS takes on a job, we don't stop until we finish it!

V0902_28_00_06_0.text: If you had fun Dueling, you're the real winner!

V0902_28_00_07_0.text:
We gotta Rush Duel again!
And let's make it official!

V0902_28_00_08_0.text: There are still tons of fun tricks for you to learn, Yudias!

V0902_28_00_09_0.text:
See that, Yuamu?
When my Deck works, it really works!

V0902_28_00_10_0.text: This means I'm finally getting a promotion!

V0902_29_00_00_0.text:
I lost...
But this match was really close.

V0902_29_00_01_0.text: I've decided I'm done losing and I'll never lose again!

V0902_29_00_01_1.text: But that means I gotta train harder than ever before!

V0902_29_00_02_0.text: I blamed my Earthdama when I should've blamed myself.

V0902_29_00_03_0.text: No matter how many times I fall, I gotta get back up.

V0902_29_00_03_1.text: That's the only way to get tougher.

V0902_29_00_04_0.text: I don't mind losing to an alien, but I lost to a beginner...

V0902_29_00_06_0.text: You're allowed to go easy on me, you know.

V0902_29_00_07_0.text: Your Deck's awesome, but I'll hold on to mine.

V0902_29_00_08_0.text: You not only stole my Earthdama, you stole this win from me!

V0902_29_00_09_0.text: I don't know anyone who loves Miss Mutton more than you.

V0902_29_00_11_0.text: Is there no way to stop Damamu?

V0902_30_00_00_0.text: Only an alien could've done this!

V0902_30_00_01_0.text: Admit you're an alien and give me back my Earthdama!

V0902_34_00_00_0.text: If I make a promise, I keep it!

V0902_34_00_01_0.text: I won't let the past hold me back.

V0902_34_00_03_0.text: Dueling's got to be more fun than this!

V0902_34_00_04_0.text: That wasn't a mistake! It was calculated!

V0902_34_00_05_0.text: Even if I'm down to 100 LP, that's still not 0!

V0902_34_00_06_0.text: It's okay to Duel and eat at the same time!

V0902_34_00_07_0.text: I can tell you're really into this Duel!

V0902_34_00_10_0.text: Only an alien would make a move like that!

V0902_34_00_11_0.text: That monster is as popular as Miss Mutton!

V0902_34_00_13_0.text: There are billions of planets with billions of aliens!

V0902_35_00_00_0.text:
If you find an alien, call on me!
Yuhi Ohdo!

V0902_36_00_00_0.text: This is the perfect time for you to take over!

V0902_36_00_04_0.text:
This is a Rush Duel!
You can turn this match around!

V0902_08_00_00_0.text: With my Spell Card, Jointech Joint...

V0902_08_00_01_0.text:
Join the cuts and welds!
Join 'em into unbreakable strength!

V0902_08_00_01_1.text: The Equip Spell, Jointech Rush Horn!

V0902_08_00_02_0.text: I activate the Spell Card, Pierce!!

V0902_08_00_03_0.text: I activate the Spell Card, Barrage of Steel!

V0902_08_00_04_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Fuuuusionnnn!

V0902_08_00_05_0.text: I activate my Trap Card, Tribute Lock!

V0902_08_00_06_0.text:
I activate my Trap Card!
Thunder Spark!

V0902_08_00_07_0.text: I activate the Trap Card, Jointech Ignition!

V0902_08_00_08_0.text: I activate the Trap Card, Jointech Great Wall!

V0902_08_00_09_0.text: I activate the Trap Card, Jointech Bumper!

V0902_08_00_10_0.text:
I activate my Trap Card!
Power Shock!

V0902_08_00_11_0.text:
Speed up the speed!
Cuz I'm typing up power for my monster!

V0902_08_00_12_0.text: I activate the Equip Spell, Cracking Claw!

V0902_08_00_13_0.text:
I activate my Trap Card!
Advance Block!

V0902_08_00_14_0.text: I activate the Trap Card, Packet Cylinder!

V0902_08_00_15_0.text:
I activate my Trap Card!
RB Dragophone!

V0902_09_00_01_0.text: I activate Jointech Burst Dragon's effect!

V0902_09_00_03_0.text: I activate Tamabot Burst Dragon's effect!

V0902_09_00_04_0.text: I activate Jointech Tosceratops's effect and toss a coin!

V0902_40_00_00_1.text:
Yeah! Heads!
That's what I meant!

V0902_09_00_18_0.text: I activate Art Angel Metal Position's effect!

V0902_09_00_23_0.text: Beta Burn Dragon activates its effect!

V0902_37_00_00_0.text:
Join with heart!
Join with courage!
Join with endless power!

V0902_37_00_01_0.text: Join with heart and courage to roar like never before!

V0902_37_00_02_0.text: Roar like never before into an ocean of electrons!

V0902_37_00_03_0.text: Join with the heart to brave the battlefield!

V0902_37_00_04_0.text: Though it's small, it combines with the strongest of all!

V0902_37_00_05_0.text:
Join with force and fury!
Join with unstoppable power!

V0902_37_00_06_0.text:
Join with zeal and vigor!
Join the tools of heroic victory!

V0902_37_00_07_0.text: Join infinite strength to stomp the competition!

V0902_37_00_08_0.text: With perfect patience comes the power to pummel!

V0902_13_00_23_0.text: Here's a monster that may be small but gives it its all!

V0902_37_00_09_0.text: Though they're small,  they can control what's tall!

V0902_37_00_10_0.text:
All right...
I'm gonna nail this summoning speech!

V0902_37_00_10_1.text: Pump up the bass and put the trouble in the treble!

V0902_37_00_11_0.text: The data surges wirelessly into an ocean of electrons!

V0902_37_00_12_0.text: Power up your processors and blast across the net!

V0902_37_00_13_0.text: Parse the program and break the firewalls!

V0902_13_00_30_0.text: Update to the latest patch and stay on the cutting edge!

V0902_13_00_31_0.text: Clock up both your cores to parallel process with power!

V0902_19_00_04_0.text: Tosceratops isn’t scared of your Trap Cards!

V0902_27_00_01_0.text: I won't survive unless I do something...
